name: Okta
description: Okta Identity Cloud is an integrated identity solutino that securely connects the right peopl eto the right technology and provides incredible flexisbility in managing access in our company. It provides single sign on and with it users will be alble to log in once with a single ID and access various services on multiple applicaiotn without having to enter authentication details again. With Okta's Authentication API we can also secure our APIs and backends to make sure only authorized users and applications can access them.
